$comment: Selector registry. Flows reference @keys, never raw copy. text = Maestro regex (matches visible text OR a11y label). Anchors target the seeded data (src/qa/fixtures.ts). Card-ish rows can merge children into one a11y label on iOS, so name anchors are wrapped in .* where they ride inside a labeled row.

due-title.note: DueScreen header title (i18n due.title); also the tab label, but the header renders first in the tree

overdue-task.note: seeded overdue task row (fixtures: anchored 110d ago on a 90d interval)

done-overdue.note: the one-tap Done circle's a11y label on the seeded overdue task

done-toast.note: the undo bar after a Done tap (i18n due.doneToast) — the Tier-2 outcome proof that markDone landed

tasks-tab.note: bottom tab button (tabBarButtonTestID) — copy-proof; text matching collides with the Tasks screen title and category headers

add-task-fab.note: the + FAB on Tasks (a11y label tasks.add). Opens the library picker.

library-sump.note: a library row NOT in the seed — the add-from-library target

library-add-one.note: the add bar after selecting one library task (i18n library.addOne)

setup-title.note: TaskSetup header title (i18n setup.title) — the post-add wizard step

setup-link-sump.note: the one-tap create+link button's a11y label on the Sump pump suggestion (setup.link + library hint)

setup-linked-sump.note: the linked state after the tap (i18n setup.linked) — the Tier-2 outcome proof the appliance was created and linked

setup-done.note: the setup screen's Done bar (i18n setup.done); unique on this screen

added-task.note: the added task on the Tasks list. assertNot before / assert after = the library add landed.

appliances-tab.note: bottom tab button — testID because the Tasks screen shows an 'Appliances' category section header

find-manual.note: the manual-finder button on the appliance editor (i18n appliances.findManual)

appliance-back.note: ScreenHeader back button a11y label (shell common.back)
